notes: Point-connects functional actions into the existing Clean V3 tree without rebuilding the menu tree.
Adds a comments:repatch action available from the selected post card as '🔁 Обновить кнопку'. It uses the existing postPatcher and keeps OpenApp launch policy unchanged.
Overrides only comments:post rendering to add the repatch button; main menu, comments choose-post and OpenApp comments UI are untouched.
Banner input now sends a fresh confirmation card below the user's text/link/button message, so the admin sees that the value was saved.
Banner callbacks remain routed directly to the banner flow from CC6.5.8.4.
